inputs.label: Area to Tile
inputs.businessContext: Total surface area to be tiled, in square meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total surface area to be tiled, in square meters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fayans döşenecek toplam yüzey alanı, metrekare cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtfläche in Quadratmetern, die gefliest werden soll.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Surface totale à carreler, en mètres carrés.

inputs.label: Trowel Notch Size
inputs.businessContext: Size of the square-notched trowel used, determines adhesive coverage rate.

businessContext_i18n.en: Size of the square-notched trowel used, determines adhesive coverage rate.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kullanılan kare çentikli malanın boyutu, yapıştırıcı kaplama oranını belirler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Größe der verwendeten Zahnkelle, bestimmt die Klebstoffabdeckungsrate.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taille de la truelle carrée crantée utilisée, détermine le taux de couverture de l'adhésif.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Additional percentage for waste, cuts, and spillage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional percentage for waste, cuts, and spillage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Atık, kesim ve dökülme için ek yüzde.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzlicher Prozentsatz für Verschnitt, Zuschnitte und Verschütten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage supplémentaire pour les déchets, coupes et débordements.

inputs.label: Bag Weight
inputs.businessContext: Net weight of a single thinset mortar bag.

businessContext_i18n.en: Net weight of a single thinset mortar bag.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek bir thinset harç torbasının net ağırlığı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids net d'un sac de mortier-colle.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
